launch_inputs.test_plan: Execute the uploaded audit export readiness test plan and produce a verification packet that states what ran, what failed, what was skipped, and what remains unverified.
launch_inputs.test_scope: Stay within the provided plan and evidence; do not claim coverage for scenarios the packet does not actually support.
launch_inputs.environment_notes: Treat the run as a release-candidate environment with enterprise-size exports and operator-visible retry behavior in scope.
